linkedin_profile.headline: Chief Commercial Officer | MBA, Commercial Leadership, Luxury Hospitality
linkedin_profile.about: As a results driven commercial executive with a deep rooted background in luxury hospitality, I specialise in accelerating growth, forging strategic global partnerships, and leading high performing teams across sales, marketing, and revenue disciplines. Currently serving as CCO at Absheron Hotel Group, I oversee the commercial strategy for a portfolio of 12 luxury and lifestyle properties across Azerbaijan and the region. I lead the transformation of commercial functions, drive market positioning, and champion data driven performance and innovation with long term success in sight. Prior to this, I held senior leadership roles with luxury brands including Bürgenstock Collection (as VP Sales & Partnerships) and Jumeirah Group, where I spearheaded initiatives for key international markets and elevated brand presence serving at GSO level. Recognised for my strategic thinking, collaborative leadership style, and strong client orientation, I thrive in dynamic, multicultural environments where I can deliver measurable impact. I am passionate about developing talent, cultivating resilience within teams, and creating meaningful connections that drive commercial excellence. A former high level athlete, I bring a competitive edge, discipline, and endurance to everything I do, qualities that fuel my drive to lead with purpose and exceed expectations in fast paced, high stakes settings.

experience.title: Visiting Lecturer
experience.description:
The International Marketing Course for Master 2 Students aims at presenting a set of guiding principles for understanding consumers’ behavior, competitors’ dynamic and related variables that have an impact on marketing strategy. The program starts by identifying and measuring consumers' need, assessing the competitive environment, selecting the most appropriate customer targets and developing marketing strategy in order to satisfy consumers' needs. Presentation focuses on both theory and applications of marketing concepts through case studies, discussions, individual assignments, and group projects. Structure Chapter 1 Diagnosis SWOT and marketing survey Chapter 2 Strategy : segmentation targeting positioning Chapter 3 Mix Marketing : product price promotion place Chapter 4 International marketing and cross cultural marketing Objectives Students will: • learn how to critically analyse and solve marketing strategy related problems • develop analytical skills in the formulation and implementation of an integrated marketing concept • develop interpersonal and teamwork skills through group project activities Book references Armstrong Gary and Philip Kotler (2020) Principles of Marketing, Pearson.
Department: Education • Level: Specialist

linkedin_profile.about:
Chris is a seasoned hospitality professional and consultant with over 30 years of experience in the luxury and upscale segment. He is currently the General Manager of the Waldorf Astoria Lusail Doha, a leading hotel in Qatar, and the COO of Aureus Advisors, a bespoke boutique hospitality consulting firm. He is passionate about delivering above-and-beyond moments for guests and colleagues, and believes in excellence of service and innovation as the key to success. He has a proven track record of financial performance, total quality management, sales and marketing, positioning, branding, talent management, portfolio management, and owner relations across five continents. He is also a guest columnist, a tourism ambassador, and a recipient of multiple awards for leadership and business excellence. Chris has also been listed on the GM's Power List 2023 for the Middle East.

Total Experience: 36 years and 9 months

experience.title: Managing Director
experience.description: I am responsible for the overall portfolio performance, strategic development, and owner relations of Switzerland’s largest hospitality investment, the Bürgenstock Hotels AG. With experience spanning several continents, I have an accomplished track record in luxury, upscale and select service hotels, having operated through some of the most demanding business scenarios including economic downturns, uprisings, pandemics, and embargoes. I am known to be strategically focused, financially disciplined, and result-oriented with a strong track record of leadership and innovation. I am passionate about delivering benchmark setting performances for the owners through astute management and strategies. I believe first and foremost in the excellence of service, and passion in everything we do being the key to our success. With a thorough background in Food & Beverage, substantial experience in Rooms Division and Sales, Marketing as well as Controlling, I have a holistic understanding of operations. I also possess thorough knowledge of Unions and negotiation tactics as well as handling challenging ownership situations for various properties. I have successfully launched several new food and beverage concepts that were later replicated in many other hotels across many countries. Recent accolades include being selected as Newcomer of the Year 2024 by the Karl Wild Hotel Rating in Switzerland and the inclusion in the General Manager’s Power List Middle East 2023, a sign of excellence for industry leaders who have excelled and set industry leading benchmarks. He also successfully executed Switzerland’s largest ever political conference in June of 2024, Peace for Ukraine, with over 100 delegations in attendance and almost 60 Heads of State. As of October 2024, Chris is also member of the board of Swiss Deluxe Hotels, covering 38 of Switzerland’s most prolific and luxurious hotels and resorts. Chris is also a member of the European Hotel Managers Association (EHMA) since 2024.
